properties.body:
NAVAREA XIX 122/15

CLOSURE OF LORAN C STATIONS

THE GROUND BASED NAVIGATIONAL SYSTEM LORAN-C WILL BE DISCONTINUED IN NORWAY FROM THE 1ST OF JANUARY 2016. 
THE FOUR NORWEGIAN LORAN-C STATIONS ON VAERLANDET, JAN MAYEN, BOE IN VESTERAALEN AND BERLEVAAG WILL CLOSE DOWN FROM THIS DATE.
 
NAVAREA XIX 122/15

CLOSURE OF LORAN C STATIONS

THE GROUND BASED NAVIGATIONAL SYSTEM LORAN-C WILL BE DISCONTINUED IN NORWAY FROM THE 1ST OF JANUARY 2016. 
THE FOUR NORWEGIAN LORAN-C STATIONS ON VAERLANDET, JAN MAYEN, BOE IN VESTERAALEN AND BERLEVAAG WILL CLOSE DOWN FROM THIS DATE.
 PREVIOUS HF WARNINGS ISSUED NAVAREA XIX 145/14
